author1.title: GitHub Pages Jekyll Theme
author1.description: Designed for GitHub Pages. Fork. Edit _config.yml. Upload screenshot/video. Push to gh-pages branch. Voilá!

author2.title: iPhone Device Preview
author2.description: Preview your app in the context of an iPhone device. Five different device colors included.

author3.title: Video Support
author3.description: Preview app video on the iPhone device simply by placing your video files in the videos folder.

author4.title: Automatic Icon and Metadata
author4.description: Enter iOS app ID in the _config.yml file to automatically fetch app icon, price and App Store Link.

author5.title: Easy to Tweak
author5.description: Tweak accent color, images, icons and transparency via the _config.yml file. No HTML/CSS needed.

author6.title: Feature List
author6.description: Add features (like this one) to your site via the _config.yml file. No HTML/CSS needed.

author7.title: Smart App Banner
author7.description: Display a smart app banner on iOS devices.

author8.title: Social Links
author8.description: Easily add social media accounts and contact info in the footer via the _config.yml file. No HTML/CSS needed.

author9.title: FontAwesome Support
author9.description: Pick custom Font Awesome icons for the feature list via the _config.yml file. No HTML/CSS needed.
